locale.name: en_US
locale.message: Additional locales
Administrator Account
This user account will become the site administrator and have complete access to the system. Additional user accounts can be created after installation.
NO
Yes
Client character set
The encoding to use for data sent to and received from browsers.
The configuration file <tt>config.inc.php</tt> does not exist or is not readable.
Connection character set

The encoding to use for data sent to and received from the database. This should be the same as the client character set. Note that this capability is only supported with MySQL >= 4.x. or PostgreSQL >= 7.x. Select "Not applicable" if your database server does not meet these requirements.
Contents of configuration file
Create new database

To use this option your database system must support remote database creation and your user account must have the appropriate permissions to create new databases. If installation fails with this option selected, manually create the database on your server and run the installer again with this option disabled.
Database character set

The encoding to use for data stored in the database. Note that this capability is only supported with MySQL >= 4.x. or PostgreSQL >= 7.x. Select "Not applicable" if your database server does not meet these requirements.
Database driver
The system currently only supports MySQL and PostgreSQL, in case you're unable to select one, contact your system administrator to ensure your server has the required PHP extensions.
Host

Leave the hostname blank to connect using domain sockets instead of over TCP/IP. This is not necessary with MySQL, which will automatically use sockets if "localhost" is entered, but is required with some other database servers such as PostgreSQL.
Database name
Password
Database Settings
Username
Bcrypt is securely enforced for password standard encryption algorithm ScholarWizdam standards.
Password encryption algorithm
Directory for uploads
File Settings
A client character set must be selected.
A database driver must be selected.
The database name is required.
A valid email address for the administrator account is required.
The algorithm to use for encrypting user passwords must be selected.
The directory to be used for storing uploaded files is required.
A locale must be selected.
A password for the administrator account is required.
The administrator passwords do not match.
Separate multiple values with commas
The administrator username can contain only alphanumeric characters, underscores, and hyphens, and must begin and end with an alphanumeric character.
A username for the administrator account is required.
ScholarWizdam Installation
ScholarWizdam Upgrade

ScholarWizdam Version {$version}

Thank you for downloading the Sangia Publishing House's ScholarWizdam. Before proceeding, please read the README file included with this software. For more information about the Sangia Publishing House (SPH) and its software projects, please visit the Sangia Publishing House website. If you have bug reports or technical support inquiries about ScholarWizdam, see the support forum or visit SPH's online bug reporting system. Although the support forum is the preferred method of contact, you can also email the team at wizdam.contact@gmail.com.

Upgrade

If you are upgrading an existing installation of ScholarWizdam or from OJS 2.x, click here to proceed. NOTE: For upgrade from OJS 3.x click here to proceed (under development).
If you are upgrading an existing installation of OJS 3.x, click here to proceed (under development).

Recommended system requirements

  • PHP >= {$phpRequiredVersion}; you are currently using PHP {$phpVersion}{$wrongPhpText}
  • MySQL >= 4.x or PostgreSQL >= 7.x (including PostgreSQL 8.x)
  • Apache >= 1.3.2x or >= 2.0.4x or Microsoft IIS 6
  • Operating system: Any OS that supports the above software, including Linux, BSD, Solaris, Mac OS X, Windows

As Sangia Publishing House does not have the resources to test every possible combination of software versions and platforms, no guarantee of correct operation or support is implied.
Changes to these settings can be made after installation by editing the file config.inc.php in the base ScholarWizdam directory, or using the site administration web interface.

Supported database systems

ScholarWizdam has currently only been tested on MySQL and PostgreSQL, although other database management systems supported by ADOdb may work (in full or partially). Compatibility reports and/or code patches for alternative DBMSs can be sent to the ScholarWizdam team.

Pre-Installation Steps

1. The following files and directories (and their contents) must be made writable:

  • config.inc.php is writable (optional): {$writable_config}
  • public/ is writable: {$writable_public}
  • cache/ is writable: {$writable_cache}
  • cache/t_cache/ is writable: {$writable_templates_cache}
  • cache/t_compile/ is writable: {$writable_templates_compile}
  • cache/_db is writable: {$writable_db_cache}

2. A directory to store uploaded files must be created and made writable (see "File Settings" below).
Password encryption uses bcrypt — a secure, industry-standard hashing algorithm. No configuration required.

ScholarWizdam Version {$version}

Thank you for downloading the Sangia Publishing House's ScholarWizdam. Before proceeding, please read the README and UPGRADE files included with this software. For more information about the Sangia Publishing House and its software projects, please visit the Sangia Publishing House website. If you have bug reports or technical support inquiries about ScholarWizdam, see the support forum or visit Sangia Publishing House's online bug reporting system. Although the support forum is the preferred method of contact, you can also email the team at wizdam.contact@gmail.com.

It is strongly recommended that you back up your database, files directory, and ScholarWizdam installation directory before proceeding.

If you are running in PHP Safe Mode, please ensure that the max_execution_time directive in your php.ini configuration file is set to a high limit. If this or any other time limit (e.g. Apache's "Timeout" directive) is reached and the upgrade process is interrupted, manual intervention will be required.

For complete Unicode (UTF-8) support, select UTF-8 for all character set settings. Note that this support currently requires a MySQL >= 4.x. or PostgreSQL >= 7.x database server. Please also note that full Unicode support requires PHP >= 7.4.0 compiled with support for the mbstring library (enabled by default in most recent PHP installations). You may experience problems using extended character sets if your server does not meet these requirements.

Your server currently supports mbstring: {$supportsMBString}
Your server currently allows file uploads: {$allowFileUploads}
Your server currently allows a maximum file upload size of: {$maxFileUploadSize}
The primary language to use for this system. Please consult the ScholarWizdam documentation if you are interested in support for languages not listed here.

Select any additional languages to support in this system. These languages will be available for use by journals hosted on the site. Additional languages can also be installed at any time from the site administration interface.

Enter full pathname to an existing directory where uploaded files are to be kept. This directory should not be directly web-accessible. Please ensure that this directory exists and is writable prior to installation. Windows path names should use forward slashes, e.g. "C:/myjournal/files".

ScholarWizdam requires access to a SQL database to store its data. See the system requirements above for a list of supported databases. In the fields below, provide the settings to be used to connect to the database.
Install ScholarWizdam
Upgrade ScholarWizdam
Warning: If installation failed part way through database installation you may need to drop your ScholarWizdam database or database tables before attempting to reinstall the database.

IMPORTANT!

The installer could not automatically overwrite the configuration file. Before attempting to use the system, please open config.inc.php in a suitable text editor and replace its contents with the contents of the text field below.

Installation of ScholarWizdam has completed successfully.

To begin using the system, login with the username and password entered on the previous page.

If you wish to receive news and updates, you can:

  1. Register your journal, conference, or harvester and receive updates on software upgrades, security patches, and more.
  2. Join our discussion list for ScholarWizdam the Harvester, Lemon8-XML, or all of the above.
  3. Subscribe to the Wizdam blog RSS feed.

If you have questions or comments, please visit the support forum.

Upgrade of ScholarWizdam to version {$version} has completed successfully.

Don't forget to set the "installed" setting in your config.inc.php configuration file back to On.

If you haven't already registered and wish to receive news and updates, please register at http://wizdam.sangia.org/scholarwizdam/register. If you have questions or comments, please visit the support forum.
WARNING: Your current version of PHP does not meet the minimum requirements for installation. It is recommended to upgrade to a more recent release of PHP.
Errors occurred during installation
SQL statements for installation

The directory specified for uploaded files does not exist or is not writable.

Error parsing the email template file <tt>{$file}</tt>.
Error parsing the filter configuration file <tt>{$file}</tt>.

Marked locales may be incomplete.
Locale Settings
OAI Settings
A unique identifier used to identify metadata records indexed from this site using the Open Archives Initiative Protocol for Metadata Harvesting.
Repository Identifier
The public files directory does not exist or is not writable.
Release Notes
Security Settings
Beacon
Provide a unique site ID and OAI base URL to Sangia Publishing House for statistics and security alert purposes only.

There is a new version of ScholarWizdam available! You are currently using ScholarWizdam {$currentVersion}. The most recent version is ScholarWizdam {$latestVersion}. Please visit this page to download the most recent version and find upgrade instructions.

There is a new version of ScholarWizdam available! You are currently using ScholarWizdam {$currentVersion}. The most recent version is ScholarWizdam {$latestVersion}. Please contact your Site Administrator ({$siteAdminName}, {$siteAdminEmail}) to notify them of this new release. More information can be found here.
